description: A SaaS product that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.detail: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support.
We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook for direct publishing.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade from Basic to Pro at any time. The price difference is prorated.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV formats for upload.
